title: libsubid tag not added
body:
Many Linux OS have gcc with -Wl,--as-needed as default.
hack/libsubid_tag.sh not ready for --as-needed and  libsubid tag not added to STORAGETAGS in Makefile.

"cc -o "$tmpdir"/libsubid_tag -l subid -x c foo.c" should be
"cc foo.c -o "$tmpdir"/libsubid_tag -l subid -x c " for --as-needed
or add -Wl,--no-as-needed flag.

comments.body: Care to open a PR to fix the way you like?
